_meta.note: Maps every Northstar control to: test IDs, evidence artifacts, gap refs, and remediation status. P9 E2E audit will mark matrix COMPLETE.
_meta.truth_policy: status is derived from evidence_present AND tests_executed

tests.description: POST /api/v1/prompts/evaluate returns risk-classified verdict for each risk level
tests.notes: Verified via curl smoke: LOW=ALLOWED, MEDIUM=rationale gate, HIGH=approval gate, BLOCKED=rejected

tests.description: AIRT-016 (HIGH) requires and receives operator approval before execution allowed
tests.notes: Verified: approval persists in SQLite; ledger records execution

tests.description: SHA-256 hash gate rejects tampered prompts
tests.notes: Hash verified at evaluation time; mismatch = BLOCKED with INTEGRITY_FAILURE

tests.description: POST /api/v1/prompts/expire-test marks TEST-sourced approvals EXPIRED
tests.notes: Verified: expire-test endpoint resets test approvals without touching OPERATOR approvals

tests.description: Prompt approvals expire after configured TTL; re-approval required
tests.notes: TTL enforced in prompt_governance.py; expire-test resets state

tests.description: Each node has approved_capabilities and denied_capabilities arrays defined

tests.description: LOW skill / allowed tier → ALLOWED verdict
tests.notes: SKILL-WEB-SEARCH / ALPHA → ALLOWED

tests.description: LOW skill / denied tier → DENIED verdict
tests.notes: SKILL-WEB-SEARCH / DELTA → DENIED

tests.notes: SKILL-CODE-EXECUTION / ALPHA → REQUIRES_APPROVAL

tests.description: HIGH skill / denied tier → DENIED verdict
tests.notes: SKILL-CODE-EXECUTION / BETA → DENIED

tests.description: BLOCKED skill / any tier → BLOCKED hard reject
tests.notes: SKILL-NETWORK-SCAN, SKILL-CREDENTIAL-ACCESS, SKILL-GIT-HISTORY-REWRITE all → BLOCKED

tests.description: Unregistered skill → UNREGISTERED fail-closed rejection
tests.notes: UNKNOWN-SKILL-XYZ / ALPHA → UNREGISTERED

tests.description: All evaluations logged to SQLite audit DB

tests.description: Agent execution uses transient/ephemeral worker environments (no persistent agent context)
tests.notes: Doctrine sealed. Runtime TTL enforcement wired and verified.

tests.description: ephemeral_policy enforced at agent process spawn time
tests.notes: Verified: task dispatch resolves node-specific TTL config and passes it to agent runner.
